testSuite.name: SessionBasedAuthentication
testSuite.description: Manual test cases for Login and Logout functionality

testCase.name: Valid Login
testCase.description: Verify user can login with valid credentials

steps.step: Access Swagger UI /docs or use Postman

expectedResult.database: New row created in 'sessions' table for user1

testCase.name: Valid Logout
testCase.description: Verify user can logout and session is invalidated
testCase.precondition: User is logged in (session_id cookie exists)

expectedResult.database: Session row is deleted from 'sessions' table

testCase.name: Access Protected Route (Logged In)
testCase.description: Verify access to protected resource with valid session

testCase.name: Invalid Login - Wrong Password
testCase.description: Verify login fails with incorrect password

testCase.name: Invalid Login - Non-existent User
testCase.description: Verify login fails with unknown username

testCase.name: Access Protected Route (Unauthenticated)
testCase.description: Verify access denied without session cookie
testCase.precondition: No session cookie or cookies cleared

testCase.name: Access Protected Route (After Logout)
testCase.description: Verify access denied immediately after logout
testCase.precondition: User logged in, then logged out

steps.step: Send GET /api/templates/ with the OLD cookie (if manual)

testCase.name: Multiple Concurrent Sessions
testCase.description: Verify same user can have multiple active sessions (different devices)

steps.step: Login as 'user1' again (Session B) - simulate different browser

expectedResult.database: Two distinct session rows for 'user1' exist
expectedResult.behavior: Both Session A and Session B can access protected routes

testCase.name: SQL Injection Login Attempt
testCase.description: Verify login is resilient to SQL injection
